feed.title: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
feed.subtitle:
Homepage 'Notices' section is a flat sequence of

entries with no dates or list wrapper; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Commission on Governmental Ethics and Election Practices — Notices
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + July 15, 2026 + : Local Party Committee First Half of 2026 Semiannual Report due Removed: - July 3, 2026 - : Office Closed - Independence Day (observed)
